Sell.title: Sell on Hezalli

AdminSettings.title: Settings
AdminSettings.announcementDesc: Show a dismissible message across the storefront.
AdminSettings.announcementPlaceholder: e.g. Free shipping this weekend on orders over $50!
AdminSettings.platformDesc: Identity, commission, and the windows that drive returns, payouts and auto-completion.
AdminSettings.name: Platform name
AdminSettings.logoHint: Path or URL to the logo image.
AdminSettings.commissionHint: Charged to sellers on completed orders.
AdminSettings.minPayoutHint: Smallest amount a seller can withdraw.
AdminSettings.expressEnabledHint: Offer the faster Hezalli Express tier at checkout.
AdminSettings.maintenanceHint: Storefront shows a maintenance notice to everyone except admins.
AdminSettings.err_forbidden: You don’t have permission to do that.
AdminSettings.err_badDays: Day values must be between 0 and 365.
AdminSettings.err_badPayout: Minimum payout must be zero or more.
AdminSettings.walletCapHint: Max standing balance for standard users (verified users get 5×)
AdminSettings.err_badWalletLimits: Wallet limits must be non-negative and min ≤ max ≤ cap.
AdminSettings.walletCashbackHint: Credited to the buyer wallet on order completion (0 = off)
AdminSettings.expressFeeHint: Default price for Hezalli Express when a store hasn't set its own.
AdminSettings.etaHint: Estimated delivery time shown at checkout (min–max days).
AdminSettings.err_badEta: Delivery-time estimates must be whole days, with min ≤ max.
AdminSettings.walletP2pHint: ⚠️ Money transmission — licensed only. Keep OFF until authorized.
AdminSettings.expressAutoAssignHint: Hand each shipped Express parcel to the least-busy driver automatically.
AdminSettings.assignStrategyHint: How auto-assign chooses a driver for a shipped Express parcel.
AdminSettings.walletBillsHint: Buyers pay bills / top up airtime from their wallet; admins fulfill each purchase manually until a provider API is wired.
AdminSettings.walletOutflowHint: Max that can leave a wallet (send + cash-out + bills) per rolling window. 0 = no limit; VERIFIED users get 5×.
AdminSettings.pointFeeHint: Paid to a delivery point for each delivered parcel routed through it.
AdminSettings.maxAttemptsHint: Failed attempts before a parcel should be returned to the seller.
AdminSettings.pointsEnabledHint: Let sellers drop Hezalli Express parcels at partner points.
AdminSettings.err_badMaxAttempts: Max attempts must be between 1 and 10.
AdminSettings.pickupFeeHint: What buyers pay to collect from a Hezalli Point themselves. 0 = free.
AdminSettings.transferFeeHint: Paid to the ORIGIN hub of a two-hop parcel when it is delivered.
AdminSettings.staleDaysHint: Held parcels that haven't moved for this many days are flagged.
AdminSettings.pickupWindowHint: How long a pickup parcel waits at a point before it should be returned to the seller.
AdminSettings.courierFeeHint: Paid to the driver for each completed Hezalli Express delivery.

Drive.title: Deliver with Hezalli
Drive.subtitle: Join the Hezalli Express fleet and earn on your own schedule. Apply below — our team reviews every driver before activation.
Drive.benefitEarn: Earn on every delivery, paid reliably
Drive.benefitFlexible: Flexible hours — drive when you want
Drive.notesHint: Experience, availability, areas you know well…
Drive.acceptCourierTerms: I agree to the courier terms: delivering parcels safely and on time, and handling cash on delivery honestly.
Drive.reviewNote: We review every application and will contact you before activating your driver account.
Drive.submittedBody: Thanks! Our team will review your details and get in touch. You'll be able to sign into the driver app once approved.
Drive.pendingBody: Your driver application is being reviewed. We'll let you know once a decision is made.

PointApply.title: Become a Hezalli Point
PointApply.subtitle: Turn your shop into a parcel hub: sellers drop off parcels, drivers collect them, and you earn a fee for every parcel you handle.
PointApply.benefitEarn: Earn a fee per parcel handled
PointApply.benefitShop: Use the shop you already run
PointApply.benefitSimple: Everything works by scanning QR codes
PointApply.signInPrompt: Sign in to apply as a delivery point.

PointApply.alreadyPoint: You already operate a delivery point.

WalletManager.historyDesc: Processed top-ups and withdrawals, newest first.

DeliveryManager.title: Delivery overview
DeliveryManager.subtitle: Every shipment on the platform, live.
DeliveryManager.shipmentsDesc: All shipments across sellers. Filter, search, and open one to intervene.
